overall.description: A cinematic sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting NCPD officers investigating a crime scene in a futuristic urban plaza. The camera smoothly orbits around a vintage sedan with an open trunk containing a body, gradually revealing the wider scene including a second officer and a body on the pavement before the trunk closes.

police cruiser parked with flashing emergency lights

tan 1970s-style sedan with open trunk and chrome detailing
futuristic black police vehicle with red and blue emergency lights
light blue plastic equipment crate on the pavement
tall futuristic parking meter posts with digital displays
multi-story glass and steel structures with neon signage and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera orbits clockwise around a crime scene in a sunlit futuristic plaza. An NCPD officer stands near a vintage tan sedan with its trunk open, documenting the scene with a handheld device. A police cruiser is parked nearby with emergency lights flashing, while commercial towers rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: close-up view of vehicle trunk containing a body

events.description: camera moves from side view to close-up rear view focusing on the open trunk
camera passes close to the trunk lid, temporarily obscuring the view of the interior

agents.ego_description: moving closer to examine the body positioned inside the vehicle trunk

notable_agents.action: officer continuing to document the scene from behind the vehicle

entered.detail: deceased person in orange and purple clothing curled inside the trunk compartment

segments.scene_description: The camera moves closer to the rear of the vintage sedan, focusing on the open trunk revealing a body inside. The officer is now visible only in the background as the camera emphasizes the trunk's contents. The surrounding plaza and buildings remain visible but blurred in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban plaza showing full crime scene with multiple officers

events.description: camera pulls back to reveal a second body lying on the pavement and another officer
the vehicle trunk closes, concealing the body inside

agents.ego_description: pulling back to capture the wider crime scene context and all present officers

notable_agents.action: second NCPD officer standing guard near the body on the ground
first officer stepping back from the vehicle after closing the trunk

entered.detail: deceased person lying face-down on the pavement near the vehicle's front
second police officer in matching gray uniform standing near the ground body
distinctive red and gray contemporary structures with large windows

segments.scene_description: The camera pulls back to reveal the full scope of the crime scene, including a second body lying on the pavement and a second officer standing guard. The first officer closes the vehicle trunk, concealing the body inside. The scene is set against a backdrop of modern red and gray commercial buildings in the spacious urban plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous clockwise orbit around a crime scene in a sunlit futuristic plaza that shifts from a wide environmental overview to an intimate focus on a victim before expanding again. It begins by circling an NCPD officer documenting a vintage tan sedan parked near a flashing police cruiser, with towering commercial buildings framing the background. As the camera moves closer, the perspective narrows to focus specifically on the open trunk of the sedan to reveal a body inside, blurring the surrounding plaza into a soft backdrop. The scene then pulls back to reveal the full scope of the investigation, uncovering a second body on the pavement and another officer standing guard. Finally, the first officer closes the vehicle trunk, concealing the body against the backdrop of red and gray modern architecture.
